creator: mhorne@freebsd.org
text:
Hello, thank you for the report. I am sorry that it did not get proper attention.

The issue you pointed out was valid, and it seems to have been fixed in exactly the manner you proposed:
https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?id=85e43e963699a81674a8174b5375e9c85a21773d

Closing this.
